'''Clær''' was an astronomical object<ref name="CRO" /> located in the [[Claer system/Legends|Claer system]], a part of the [[Sern sector/Legends|Sern sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Southern Core]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the site of an exclusive [[Clær preparatory academy|preparatory academy]].<ref name="CRO" /> At some point between [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]] and [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' states that [[Rivoche Tarkin]] was sent by her uncle [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff]] to attend the [[Clær preparatory academy|preparatory academy]] on Clær following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Rivoche's [[Parent/Legends|father]], [[Gideon Tarkin]]. {{CSWECite|III|220|Tarkin, Gideon}} establishes that Gideon died five [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which corresponds to [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. As ''The New Essential Chronology'' also establishes that Wilhuff Tarkin perished in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Rivoche's enrollment at the Clær academy must have taken place sometime between those two dates.</ref> [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] sent his [[Gender/Legends|niece]] [[Rivoche Tarkin|Rivoche]] to Clær in order to attend the academy.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Clær was created by [[Michael Allen Horne]] and first mentioned in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Claer [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Clær, within grid square L-13.<ref name="TEA" />
